---
name: Pull Request
about: Use this template for all pull requests
---

## Description
Briefly describe the changes made in this pull request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Security fix

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
List the specific files and components modified, with a brief description of changes per file.

## Testing
Describe the testing performed to validate these changes:
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] TypeScript compilation succeeds (`npx tsc -b --noEmit`)
- [ ] Linting passes

## Security Considerations
If this change involves:
- Secret handling or encryption
- Authentication/authorization
- API endpoints
- Database changes

Describe the security implications and any mitigations applied.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
